# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - tag
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release-notes.md"
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: always
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
      when: always

.default_git_setup: &default_git_setup
  - git config --global user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@gitlab.local}"
  - git config --global user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-gitlab-ci}"
  - git fetch --all --tags --prune

prepare_context:
  stage: prepare
  rules:
    - when: always
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      MR_TITLE="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-}"
      MR_DESC="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-}"
      MR_IID="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}"
      MR_URL="${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_PROJECT_URL:-$CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/merge_requests/${MR_IID:-}"

      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] || [ -z "$MR_IID" ]; then
        MR_TITLE="$(git log -1 --pretty=%s)"
        MR_DESC="$(git log -1 --pretty=%b)"
        MR_IID=""
        MR_URL=""
      fi

      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        echo "$MR_TITLE"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESC<<EOF"
        echo "$MR_DESC"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_IID=$MR_IID"
        echo "MR_URL=$MR_URL"
      } > context.env

      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo
        if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ]; then
          echo "- ${MR_TITLE} (!${MR_IID})"
        else
          echo "- ${MR_TITLE}"
        fi
        if [ -n "$MR_URL" ]; then
          echo "  - ${MR_URL}"
        fi
        if [ -n "$MR_DESC" ]; then
          echo
          echo "## Description"
          echo
          echo "$MR_DESC"
        fi
      } > "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: context.env
    paths:
      - ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    expire_in: 1 week

build:
  stage: build
  needs: ["prepare_context"]
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Build notification:"
      echo "Title: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "MR: ${MR_URL:-N/A}"
      echo "Description:"
      echo "${MR_DESC}"
      echo
      echo "Release notes generated at ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"

test:
  stage: test
  needs: ["prepare_context"]
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Running tests for: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "MR: ${MR_URL:-N/A}"
      echo "Description:"
      echo "${MR_DESC}"
      echo "OK"

create_deploy_tag:
  stage: tag
  needs: ["prepare_context", "test"]
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: on_success
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
  script:
    - *default_git_setup
    - |
      set -euo pipefail

      sanitize_tag () {
        echo "$1" \
          | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' \
          | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+//; s/-+$//; s/-+/-/g' \
          | cut -c1-50
      }

      TITLE_SLUG="$(sanitize_tag "${MR_TITLE}")"
      DATE_UTC="$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
      SHORT_SHA="${CI_COMMIT_SHA:0:8}"

      if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ]; then
        DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}/mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-${TITLE_SLUG}-${DATE_UTC}-${SHORT_SHA}"
      else
        DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}/${TITLE_SLUG}-${DATE_UTC}-${SHORT_SHA}"
      fi

      TAG_MESSAGE="Deploy: ${MR_TITLE}
MR: ${MR_URL:-N/A}

${MR_DESC}
"
      git tag -a "${DEPLOY_TAG}" -m "${TAG_MESSAGE}" "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
      git push origin "${DEPLOY_TAG}"

      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG}" > deploy_tag.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy_tag.env
    expire_in: 1 week

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs: ["prepare_context", "create_deploy_tag"]
  environment:
    name: production
  script:
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      echo "Deploy notification:"
      echo "Deploy Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG:-N/A}"
      echo "Feature/MR Title: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "MR: ${MR_URL:-N/A}"
      echo "Description:"
      echo "${MR_DESC}"
      echo
      echo "Release notes:"
      cat "${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
    - |
      set -euo pipefail
      git config --global user.email "${GITLAB_USER_EMAIL:-ci@gitlab.local}"
      git config --global user.name "${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-gitlab-ci}"

      DEPLOY_COMMIT_MESSAGE="Deploy: ${MR_TITLE}
Deploy Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG:-N/A}
MR: ${MR_URL:-N/A}

${MR_DESC}
"
      echo "${DEPLOY_COMMIT_MESSAGE}" > deploy-commit-message.txt
      echo "Deployment commit message prepared in deploy-commit-message.txt"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deploy-commit-message.txt
      - ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    expire_in: 1 week
